门店设计 · 视觉系统 · APAC Retail Design · Visual Systems · APAC

我不做"好看的房间"。概念要有穿透力，落地要有施工图逻辑，标准要能在三百家店里精准运转。 I don't make "pretty rooms." Concepts must cut through. Standards must survive 300 stores.

01 —

设计哲学Philosophy

空间是品牌最诚实的承诺。
设计不是装饰，是系统效能的皮肤。 Space is a brand's most honest promise.
Design isn't decoration, it's system performance made visible.

中央美术学院建筑系出身，历经十五年甲方视角的淬炼——从联合办公到科技总部，从全球设计中台到新能源零售旗舰。我的方法论始终如一：将设计语言转化为可复制的商业资产，而非一次性作品。 Architecture-trained at CAFA, refined through 15 years of client-side practice — co-working, tech campuses, global design systems, EV retail. My method stays constant: turn design language into replicable commercial assets, not one-off projects.

001
空间概念研发Spatial Concept R&D
从品牌战略出发，将抽象叙事转化为可施工空间语言，擅长旗舰与前瞻性概念的极限输出。From brand strategy to buildable spatial language. Flagship and forward concept delivery under pressure.
FlagshipConceptBrand Space
002
标准化体系建构Standardization Systems
跨三个行业的标准化研发：模块拆解、成本锚定、可复制路径，让设计在百店网络中精准运行。Cross-industry standardization: modular deconstruction, cost anchoring, scalable paths that hold at 100+ locations.
SOPModularScalable
003
全链路设计管理Full-chain Design Management
